name: flcn-sec
description: Real-time credential detection and redaction. Protects against leaking API keys, tokens, and secrets to AI coding assistants.

commands.title: FLCN Sec: Scan Current File for Credentials
FLCN Sec: Redact All Credentials in File
FLCN Sec: Exclude Sensitive Files from AI (Copilot + Cursor)
FLCN Sec: Open Redacted View (safe to share with AI)
FLCN Sec: Install Git Pre-commit Hook
FLCN Sec: Uninstall Git Pre-commit Hook
FLCN Sec: Scan Dependencies for Vulnerabilities (OSV)

flcn-sec.enableRealTimeScan.description: Scan files in real time as you type and show inline diagnostics.

flcn-sec.warnOnOpen.description: Show a warning when opening a file that contains credentials, with an option to redact immediately.

flcn-sec.warnOnSave.description: Show a warning notification when saving a file that contains credentials.

flcn-sec.excludeFilePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files to skip entirely (e.g. '**/*.test.ts', '**/fixtures/**').

flcn-sec.maxFileSizeKb.description: Maximum file size in KB to scan. Larger files are skipped.

flcn-sec.customDetectors.markdownDescription:
**Custom regex patterns** to detect as credentials, in addition to the built-ins.

Example:
```json
[{ "name": "MyApp Token", "pattern": "myapp_[A-Za-z0-9]{32}", "flags": "g" }]
```

name.description: Display name shown in diagnostics and the findings log.

pattern.description: JavaScript regex pattern string (no slashes, no flags — use the 'flags' field).

flags.description: Regex flags, e.g. 'gi', 'gim'. The 'g' flag is always added automatically.

group.description: Capture group index that IS the secret value (0 = full match). Use 1+ to redact only the value while preserving surrounding context (e.g. a KEY= label).

flcn-sec.allowlist.markdownDescription:
**Suppress specific findings.** A finding is suppressed if ALL specified conditions in a rule match.

Built-in shortcut: add `# flcn-sec-ignore` to any line to suppress findings on that line.

Example — suppress example/placeholder values:
```json
[{ "valuePattern": "^(example|placeholder|dummy|REPLACE_ME)", "description": "Allow example values" }]
```
Example — suppress JWTs in test files:
```json
[{ "detectorName": "JSON Web Token", "filePattern": "**/*.test.*" }]
```

description.description: Human-readable note explaining why this suppression is safe.

valuePattern.description: Regex matched against the detected credential value. Suppresses if it matches.

linePattern.description: Regex matched against the full source line. Use '# flcn-sec-ignore' for inline suppression.

filePattern.description: Glob pattern. Only apply this rule to matching files, e.g. '**/*.test.ts' or '**/fixtures/**'.

detectorName.description: Only suppress findings from this specific detector, e.g. 'JSON Web Token'.

flcn-sec.osv.enabled.description: Enable OSV.dev vulnerability scanning for dependency manifests (package.json, requirements.txt, Cargo.toml, Gemfile, go.mod).

flcn-sec.osv.scanOnOpen.description: Run an OSV.dev vulnerability scan automatically when the project opens.

flcn-sec.osv.scanIntervalMinutes.description: How often (in minutes) to re-scan dependencies for new vulnerabilities. Set to 0 to disable interval scanning.

enumDescriptions: Show as error only for CRITICAL vulnerabilities.
Show as error for HIGH and CRITICAL vulnerabilities (recommended).
Show as error for MEDIUM, HIGH, and CRITICAL vulnerabilities.
Never show as error — report all as warnings/info only.
flcn-sec.osv.blockSeverity.description: Severity level at or above which vulnerabilities are shown as errors in the Problems panel. Findings below this level show as warnings or info.

flcn-sec.github.token.description: GitHub personal access token for GitHub Security Advisories API (GHSA). Without a token, rate limit is 60 req/hr. With token: 5000 req/hr.

flcn-sec.nvd.apiKey.description: NVD API key from https://nvd.nist.gov/developers/request-an-api-key. Without key: 5 req/30s. With key: 50 req/30s.

flcn-sec.nvd.enabled.description: Enable NVD (NIST) CVE scanning. Slower than OSV/GHSA due to rate limits.

flcn-sec.npmAudit.enabled.description: Enable npm audit scanning for Node.js projects.

flcn-sec.disabledDetectors.markdownDescription:
**Disable specific built-in detectors** by name. Useful when a pattern causes too many false positives in your codebase.

Built-in names: `Anthropic API Key`, `OpenAI API Key`, `AWS Access Key ID`, `AWS Secret Access Key`, `GitHub Token`, `Slack Token`, `Stripe Secret Key`, `Google API Key`, `JSON Web Token`, `PEM Private Key`, `GCP Service Account`, `HuggingFace Token`, `npm Token`, `Docker Hub PAT`, `SendGrid API Key`, `DigitalOcean Token`, `Databricks Token`, `Azure Storage Key`, `MongoDB Connection String`, `Env-style Secret Assignment`.
